title: ReproLog
description: Reproducibility envelope emitted before any artifact write. Exactly 13 named atomic keys (plan Phase 0 Methods 'Reproducibility envelope', keys 1-13; ARCH §3.2). The five CLAUDE.md-mandated keys are present by name: git_head (1), pip_freeze_sha256 (3), dataset_checksums (5), rng_seed (8), model_hash (10). The 'schema_version' field is metadata, not one of the 13 record keys.

git_head.description: Key 1 (CLAUDE.md-mandated: git HEAD). Commit SHA of HEAD, or null/"UNCOMMITTED" in the pre-first-commit zero-commit state.

git_dirty.description: Key 2. Working-tree-dirty flag (git status --porcelain non-empty). True in the zero-commit state.

pip_freeze_sha256.description: Key 3 (CLAUDE.md-mandated: project-venv pip freeze). SHA-256 hex of the `uv pip freeze` output. 64 lowercase hex chars.

pip_freeze_path.description: Key 4. Repo-relative POSIX path to the captured freeze text.

dataset_checksums.description: Key 5 (CLAUDE.md-mandated: dataset checksum). Map dataset-id -> SHA-256 hex on normalized (LF) bytes / canonicalized parquet. Empty {} when no data is consumed (e.g. --dry-run).

data_vendor.description: Key 6. Vendor string, or null before any ingest.

snapshot_date.description: Key 7. Vendor snapshot date (ISO-8601 date), or null before any ingest.

rng_seed.description: Key 8 (CLAUDE.md-mandated: RNG seed). The arbitrary-but-fixed root seed (the single no-magic-number exemption, plan task 9.1).

config_resolved_sha256.description: Key 9. SHA-256 hex of the fully resolved config (or design.md SHA at pre-registration). Null only when no config is resolved.

model_hash.description: Key 10 (CLAUDE.md-mandated: model commit hash). Hash of the fitted model / estimator state, or null before any fit.

run_id.description: Key 11. Unique run identifier (used in the logs/reprolog_<run_id>.json filename).

runtime.description: Key 13. Composite interpreter+OS/arch fingerprint, kept as one key so the total is exactly 13.
